label: Role Confusion
description: Poor role separation means multiple agents can take the same actions with no clear authority hierarchy. Conflicts become unresolvable.

causal_translation.trigger_text: Role separation is below 30% — authorities overlap significantly.
causal_translation.rule_text: When all roles can do everything, there is no governance. Authority conflicts become unresolvable because no one has clear jurisdiction.
causal_translation.shift_text: Multi-agent scenarios degrade into chaos. The Action Space becomes uncoordinated.
causal_translation.effect_text: World integrity reduced by 25%. Role authorities are confused.
